== Notes for [[Item:Q104876|Q104876]] ==

* [http://mechon-mamre.org/p/pt/pt25a03.htm#22 1 Chronicles 3:22.]

Abarbanel – undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman.

Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

1 Chr 3:22; Ezr 8:2

Since the end states six children and the way colons and semicolons are placed, I may be misinterpiting the order of the children and the five listed under Shemaiah may be under shemaiah's father Shechaniah and the ones listed as children are actually his brothers.

1 Chr 3:22; Ezr 8:2

Since the end states six children and the way colons and semicolons are placed, I may be misinterpiting the order of the children and the five listed under Shemaiah may be under shemaiah's father Shechaniah and the ones listed as children are actually his brothers.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000961704956

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
